title: Ireland 1997 98 Away Jersey 942b
description: Ireland 1997-98 Away Jersey - The Orange One 🇮🇪 Irish In Asia - Delivery Takes 10-15 Days - Tracking Provided Possibly the most talked-about Ireland kit ever made.
